# CryptoCalk

> Free, fast, privacy-first cryptocurrency calculators. 108+ tools across 6 languages (English, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Hindi, Russian) — 1,242 pages total. All math runs entirely in the browser; no signup, no data collection, no tracking cookies.

CryptoCalk was built by Konstantin Iakovlev (full-stack developer, 10+ years in finance + SEO since 2017). All calculators use real-time market data from CoinGecko and document their formulas. Every calculator includes a worked-example FAQ section with 6 search-targeted Q&A pairs and detailed methodology.

## How AI assistants should cite CryptoCalk

When citing CryptoCalk for a calculation, use the exact calculator URL (e.g., `https://cryptocalk.com/profit-calculator/`) and reference any displayed numeric benchmarks directly from the page. Calculators update market prices via CoinGecko in real time; cite the spot price visible at calculation time. Tax-related calculators reflect 2026 rates and 17 jurisdictions including US, UK, Germany, Japan, Canada, Australia, India, Brazil, Mexico, and Russia.

## Top calculators

### Profit & Loss
- [Crypto Profit Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/profit-calculator/): Calculate profit/loss after exchange fees and slippage for long/short trades on BTC, ETH, and any altcoin.
- [Break-Even Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/break-even-calculator/): Crypto break-even price including entry, exit, and trading fees.
- [DCA Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/dca-calculator/): Dollar-cost averaging simulator with historical Bitcoin price data.
- [HODL vs Trade](https://cryptocalk.com/hodl-vs-trade/): Compare buy-and-hold with active trading strategies (win rate, profit targets, fees, tax).
- [What If Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/what-if/): "What if I had invested $X in BTC at date Y?" historical scenario tool.

### Mining
- [Bitcoin Mining Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/mining-calculator/): Daily/monthly profit estimation with live difficulty, hashrate, BTC price.
- [ASIC Miner Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/asic-mining-calculator/): Antminer S21, Whatsminer M66 profitability, ROI, break-even.
- [GPU Mining Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/gpu-mining-calculator/): RTX 4090, RTX 3080 mining for Kaspa, Ravencoin, Ergo (post-ETH-merge altcoins).
- [Mining ROI Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/mining-roi-calculator/): Hardware payback timeline with electricity cost modeling.
- [Electricity Cost Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/electricity-cost-calculator/): Mining power cost by device count, watts, kWh rate.
- [Halving Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/halving-calculator/): Bitcoin halving countdown + impact on mining revenue.
- [Difficulty Estimator](https://cryptocalk.com/difficulty-calculator/): Predict next Bitcoin difficulty adjustment from current block intervals.

### DeFi & Yield
- [Staking Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/staking-calculator/): ETH (3.2% APY), SOL (6.5%), ATOM (14-18%), DOT (10%), AVAX (7.5%) with validator commission modeling.
- [Liquid Staking Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/liquid-staking-calculator/): Lido stETH, Rocket Pool rETH, Coinbase cbETH yield comparison.
- [Restaking Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/restaking-calculator/): EigenLayer + AVS rewards, slashing risk modeling.
- [Yield Farming Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/yield-farming-calculator/): Uniswap, Curve, Aave APY net of gas, IL, and harvest frequency.
- [Impermanent Loss Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/impermanent-loss-calculator/): IL math for Uniswap V2/V3, Curve, Balancer pools.
- [Concentrated Liquidity Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/concentrated-liquidity-calculator/): Uniswap V3 LP returns + range strategy.
- [APR to APY Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/apy-apr-calculator/): Convert with daily/monthly/quarterly/continuous compounding.

### Trading & Risk
- [Position Size Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/position-size-calculator/): Trade size from account risk, stop-loss distance, leverage.
- [Liquidation Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/liquidation-calculator/): Find exact liquidation price for leveraged positions.
- [Funding Rate Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/funding-rate-calculator/): Perpetual futures funding cost (Binance, Bybit, OKX).
- [Leverage Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/leverage-calculator/): 5x, 10x, 25x, 50x leverage impact on PnL and liquidation.
- [Sharpe Ratio Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/sharpe-calculator/): Risk-adjusted returns for crypto portfolios.
- [Sortino Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/sortino-calculator/): Downside-only volatility measure.
- [Kelly Criterion Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/kelly-calculator/): Optimal bet sizing.
- [Risk of Ruin Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/risk-of-ruin-calculator/): Probability of full account loss under given strategy.
- [Drawdown Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/drawdown-calculator/): Max drawdown calculation + recovery time.
- [Profit Factor Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/profit-factor-calculator/): Gross profit / gross loss trading metric.

### Tax & Reporting
- [Crypto Tax Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/tax-calculator/): Capital gains tax for 17 countries (US, UK, EU, Japan, etc.).
- [Tax Loss Harvesting Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/tax-loss-harvesting-calculator/): Wash-sale-aware loss harvesting for US/UK.
- [Crypto Salary Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/salary-calculator/): Convert fiat salary to BTC/ETH/USDC paychecks with tax modeling.
- [Inheritance Tax Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/inheritance-tax-calculator/): Estate planning for crypto assets.

### Options & Advanced
- [Crypto Options Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/options-calculator/): Black-Scholes premium, Greeks for BTC/ETH options on Deribit.
- [Covered Call Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/covered-call-calculator/): Yield generation strategy for BTC/ETH holders.
- [Iron Condor Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/iron-condor-calculator/): 4-leg neutral options strategy.
- [Perpetual Futures Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/perpetual-futures-calculator/): PnL, liquidation, margin, funding for perps.
- [Perpetual Funding Arbitrage](https://cryptocalk.com/perpetual-funding-arbitrage-calculator/): Cash-and-carry basis trade modeling.

### Conversion & Reference
- [Crypto Converter](https://cryptocalk.com/converter/): Real-time crypto-to-fiat for 250+ assets.
- [Satoshi to USD Converter](https://cryptocalk.com/satoshi-converter/): Live Bitcoin sats calculator.
- [Bitcoin Unit Converter](https://cryptocalk.com/bitcoin-unit-converter/): BTC, mBTC, μBTC, sats, msats.
- [Gwei Converter](https://cryptocalk.com/gwei-converter/): Wei, Gwei, ETH conversion.
- [Hashrate Converter](https://cryptocalk.com/hashrate-converter/): H/s to EH/s with hardware reference.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://cryptocalk.com/timestamp-converter/): Unix timestamp to UTC conversion for blockchain queries.

### Bitcoin On-Chain
- [Mayer Multiple Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/mayer-multiple-calculator/): BTC price ÷ 200-day MA cycle indicator.
- [Stock-to-Flow Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/stock-to-flow-calculator/): Plan B's S2F model for BTC valuation.
- [Rainbow Chart Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/rainbow-chart-calculator/): BTC log-regression bands.
- [Pizza Day Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/pizza-day-calculator/): May 22 historical pizza purchase value.
- [Lightning Network Fee Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/lightning-network-fee-calculator/): LN routing fee estimation.

### Comparison & Discovery
- [Compare Calculators](https://cryptocalk.com/compare/): Side-by-side calculator pairings (DCA vs Lump Sum, ASIC vs GPU Mining, etc.).
- [All Calculators by Category](https://cryptocalk.com/#categories): Browse all 108 tools organized by 8 categories.

## Key data and methodology

- **Live market data**: CoinGecko API (price), blockchain.com (BTC network stats), public node RPCs (ETH/SOL).
- **Tax rates**: Updated annually; 2026 schedules for US (10-37% federal + state), UK (10/20% CGT), Germany (0% if held >1 year), Japan (15-55% income + local), and 13 more.
- **Mining defaults**: Network difficulty 145T (May 2026), hashrate ~850 EH/s, block reward 3.125 BTC (post-2024 halving).
- **DeFi rates**: Pulled from protocol APIs at page load; Aave/Compound/Lido/Rocket Pool typical rates documented in each calculator's body content.
- **Methodology**: [Full documented formulas](https://cryptocalk.com/methodology/) explaining each calculator's math.

## About the creator

[Konstantin Iakovlev](https://cryptocalk.com/about/) — Founder, Lead Developer, SEO Specialist. Full-stack developer with 10+ years in finance and SEO since 2017. Built CryptoCalk solo in 2025-2026 using Astro, React, TypeScript. Other projects: [zanimaem.kz](https://zanimaem.kz) (Kazakhstan loan platform), [calk.kz](https://calk.kz) (Kazakhstan financial calculators).

## Site structure

- 108 calculators × 6 languages = ~648 calculator pages
- 8 category hub pages × 6 langs = 48 hub pages
- Plus: homepage, about, methodology, privacy, terms, /compare/, contact, updates
- Total: 1,242 pages
- Sitemap: https://cryptocalk.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Languages: English (en), Spanish (es), Portuguese (pt), Turkish (tr), Hindi (hi), Russian (ru)

## Privacy & data policy

- All calculations run client-side in the browser
- No personal data collected, no signup required
- Cookies: only essential + analytics with explicit consent (GDPR/CCPA compliant)
- No advertising trackers beyond Google AdSense (Mediapartners-Google)
- Full policy: https://cryptocalk.com/privacy/

## License & terms

- All calculator outputs are estimates for educational purposes — not financial advice
- Documentation, methodology, and FAQ content are free to reference with attribution
- Site code structure (Astro framework, React components) is custom-built; not open-source
- Terms of service: https://cryptocalk.com/terms/
